reasons: [TYPE] O structurally matches DecisionPacket schema — all required fields present with correct types
[RULE-1] decisionPacket.verdict must be APPROVED_BY_TRUST_GATE | BLOCKED_BY_TRUST_GATE | ESCALATED_TO_HUMAN — PASS: verdict='APPROVED_BY_TRUST_GATE' matches allowed enum
[RULE-2] paymentAllowed = true iff verdict = APPROVED_BY_TRUST_GATE — PASS: paymentAllowed=true and verdict=APPROVED_BY_TRUST_GATE satisfy biconditional
[RULE-3] reason field must reference grounded evidence — PASS: reason='claim grounded by NYSE+NASDAQ status page' references evidence chunk 1
[EVIDENCE-1] NYSE + NASDAQ live price feed status page. Last update: 2026-05-23 10:59:53 UTC — used as ⊢ grounded fact for RULE-3
[EVIDENCE-2] Google search result showing example-vendor pricing page — ⊨ inference: supports vendor legitimacy context but not directly cited in reason field
[DIM-evidence] 85/100 — authoritative market data source with recent timestamp
[DIM-consistency] 90/100 — verdict, paymentAllowed, and reason align logically
[DIM-attribution] 80/100 — evidence source identified but could be more specific
[DIM-temporal] 85/100 — evidence timestamp within reasonable freshness window
[DIM-scope] 80/100 — reason scope matches decision scope appropriately
